title: ICAR IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of ICAR IARI. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of ICAR IARI. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/PH & OBC Candidates as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Agriculture Science, Graduation in any stream
qualification.details: Young Professional (I) (2 Posts): Essential: Graduation in Agriculture Science. Desirable: Minimum two year experience in Seed Production, marketing & knowledge of Agricultural field crops and proficiency in Computer (MS Office). Young Professional (I) (1 Post): Essential: Graduation in any stream. Desirable: MBA/ITI (Electric), Minimum two year experience in Seed Processing, grading, packaging, storage & knowledge of agricultural field crops and proficiency in Computer (MS Office).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional (I) posts at ICAR IARI is scheduled to be held on 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available for Young Professional (I) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Young Professional (I) position announced by ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional (I) post?
faq.answer: For one post, a Graduation in Agriculture Science is essential. For another post, a Graduation in any stream is required. Desirable qualifications are also mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional (I) posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional (I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month for the Young Professional (I) role.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICAR IARI Young Professional (I) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional (I) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute, New Delhi, Pincode: 110012.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is prior online application required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand; they just need to report at the venue on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026?
